propositions: The T5c security-overlay prompt emits advisory findings about credentials and assets the plan does not touch (e.g. demanding rotation of a Gerrit HTTP password on a plan that only destroys an SSM copy).
The T5c prompt emits same-round near-duplicate findings on the same surface/defect (e.g. two findings both demanding temp-key-file deletion).
The prompt must add an in-plan-asset scope rule requiring each finding to name the plan section/step that creates, modifies, or transmits the asset, treating merely-adjacent assets as out of scope.
The prompt must add a same-round dedup rule of one finding per (surface, defect) pair, folding additional criteria angles into that finding's text.
The change must preserve T5c posture (advisory @ 0.95) and recall on genuinely in-scope security gaps, with no routing change to the T5c entry in criteria_routing.json.
The prompt index must be regenerated as needed so the CI prompt-drift gate and lint/test suite pass.
